mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_reply (ticket_id, author_type, author_id, body, created_by) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{authorType}, #{authorId}, #{body}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT id, ticket_id AS ticketId, author_type AS authorType, author_id AS authorId, body, created_at AS createdAt FROM ticket_reply WHERE deleted=0 AND ticket_id=#{ticketId} ORDER BY id ASC
